# Code of Conduct

This project follows the
[Contributor Covenant 2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).

## TL;DR

- Be respectful in issues, pull requests, and discussions.
- Assume good faith; ask questions before drawing conclusions.
- No harassment, discrimination, or doxxing.
- Maintainers reserve the right to remove abusive comments and to
  block accounts that repeatedly violate the spirit of this code.

## Reporting

Report incidents to the repo owner via a private GitHub message,
or by opening a `confidential: true` issue. Reports stay
confidential between the reporter and the maintainers.

The full text of the Contributor Covenant is available at the URL
above; this file is the canonical short version this project ships.
